title: Leasehold schemes for the elderly management fee limit
body: "On this page you can find details on annual management fee limits for private registered providers who own or manage retirement leasehold accommodation.   From 1 April 2025 – 31 March 2026:     The basic limit is: £616   The limit when management is contracted out to an agent who charges VAT is: £706     These limits have been agreed with the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government which has policy responsibility in this area. "

taxons.title: Housing for older and vulnerable people
